"'''Blow 'em All Away'''" was a [[Music/Legends|song]] released by the [[Band/Legends|band]] [[Boba Fett and the Assassin Droids]] as a single in the period of [[Time/Legends|time]]<ref name="GG9" /> between the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].<ref name="Date">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' is set in the [[Time/Legends|time period]] between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Those battles are dated to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] and [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], respectively, by ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'', which also establishes the Battle of [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]] as the final event before the beginning of [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]].</ref> Composed in the [[Core Drive/Legends|Core Drive]] genre,<ref name="Slugthrowers" /> the song was banned by the [[Imperial Board of Culture]], who considered the track to be anti-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]].<ref name="GG9" />

==Behind the scenes==
"Blow 'em All Away" was mentioned in the [[1993]] book ''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'', a supplement to [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Simon Smith]] and [[Eric S. Trautmann|Eric Trautmann]].<ref name="GG9" />
